title: He Who With Life
content:
He who with life makes sport,

    Can prosper never;
    Who rules himself in nought,

    Is a slave ever.

    MAY each honest effort be

    Crown'd with lasting constancy.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Johann Wolfgang von Goethe, titled "He Who With Life", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
